title: Cloud in a Bottle
description: Adds the Cloud in a Bottle, granting users the ability to double jump
body:
![Double Jump](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZxhDSt82/images/6871920b2a21145aa37f80b8df424eed30fbfd1f.png)

![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server%20or%20singleplayer-00AF5C)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/807935906055979039?logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=discord&color=6577E6
)
](https://discord.gg/HermTPzzG3)
[![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UC4kkLkiJTtmlTCuFExqtFKA?style=flat&logo=youtube&label=youtube&color=FF323D)](https://www.youtube.com/@flamesatgames)
[![Patreon](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fshieldsio-patreon.vercel.app%2Fapi%3Fusername%3Dflamesatgames%26type%3Dpatrons&style=flat)](https://patreon.com/flamesatgames)

Players now have a 1/4 chance to find a **Cloud in a Bottle** in the chests of Dungeons (a.k.a. Monster Rooms). Simply keep one in your inventory and you'll be granted the unique ability to perform a Double Jump.

Don't wanna go looking for Dungeons? Use `/function flamesatgames:give_cloudinabottle` to give yourself the item!

**(Inspired by [Terraria's "Cloud in a Bottle"](https://terraria.wiki.gg/wiki/Cloud_in_a_Bottle))**
